'''Aquilaris''' was an aquatic [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Sanbra sector/Legends|Sanbra sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Once a flourishing resort world, the planet's economy largely revolved around [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]] events by the time of the end of the [[Golden Age of the Old Republic|Golden Age]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==History==
[[File:AquilarisCourse.jpg|thumb|left|220px|Podracing on Aquilaris]]
Travel between cities and islands was facilitated by underwater tunnels, constructed primarily of [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]], which provided a view of the underwater vistas and the aquatic fauna imported from [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. By the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Nave Vengaris]] encouraged [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]] and the economic boom it caused, converting many of the old and abandoned floating cities into tracks. By this time, the [[Old City (Aquilaris)|old capital]] city was left in ruins and sinking beneath the waves.<ref name="SWEIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[Jason Fry]] confirmed that [[Aquilaris Minor]] was invented to account for mapping discrepancies between the planet Aquilaris from [[Knight Errant (novel)|''Knight Errant'']] and previous sources.<ref name="Atlas">{{JCFCite|url=posts/31618818|board=Literature|thread=The Essential Atlas and Galactic Cartography: Official Discussion|user=[[Jason Fry|jasonfy]]|date=2011-03-26|time=10:52 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20191013233754/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-essential-atlas-and-galactic-cartography-official-discussion.21938930/page-163|quote=Of that list of systems, Gultanna, Manoe, Opitha Tren and Thory Prime were created for the appendix, basically for bookkeeping purposes so every sector would be associated with at least one system. The others are all established worlds.}}</ref>
